# services.tinyproxy

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.tinyproxy`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.tinyproxy.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Tinyproxy daemon. |
| `services.tinyproxy.package` | `package` | The tinyproxy package to use. |
| `services.tinyproxy.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of (atom (null, bool, int, float or string) or a list of them for duplicate keys)` | Configuration for [tinyproxy](https://tinyproxy.github.io/). |
| `services.tinyproxy.settings.Anonymous` | `list of string` | If an `Anonymous` keyword is present, then anonymous proxying is enabled. The headers listed with `Anonymous` are allowed through, while all others are denied. If no Anonymous keyword is present, then all headers are allowed through. You must include quotes around the headers. |
| `services.tinyproxy.settings.Filter` | `null or absolute path` | Tinyproxy supports filtering of web sites based on URLs or domains. This option specifies the location of the file containing the filter rules, one rule per line. |
| `services.tinyproxy.settings.Listen` | `null or string` | Specify which address to listen to. |
| `services.tinyproxy.settings.Port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Specify which port to listen to. |
